parameters.query: ={{ JSON.stringify({ $or: [ { plan_table: { $in: $('Find Family Rows').all().map(i => String((i.json || {}).tableNo || '')).filter(t => t) } }, { docType: 'meta' } ] }) }}

={{ (function(){ var t = $json.toPhone || ''; if (!t) { try { var p = JSON.parse(String($json.params || '')); if (p && p.toPhone) t = p.toPhone; } catch (e) {} } return JSON.stringify({ phoneLast10: (String(t).replace(/\D/g,'').slice(-10) || '__none__'), isActive: true }); })() }}
